top_signals.title: Yen Strengthens as Traders Brace for Holiday Intervention Risk
top_signals.summary: Options traders are paying up to hedge against sharp moves in the yen ahead of thin US holiday trading, as speculation grows that Japanese authorities may be less predictable in how they intervene to support the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
top_signals.summary: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Portugal survives late drama to beat Croatia and reach World Cup last 16
top_signals.summary: Portugal got a last-second break on an offside call to set up a last-16 clash with Spain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
